title: oxalis micrantha var. alsinoides
intro: Oxalis micrantha var. alsinoides, commonly known as the Sourgrass or Alsine-oxalis, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Oxalidaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits like reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic, making it a useful remedy for various ailments. Oxalis micrantha var. alsinoides can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves and flowers are often used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
